use_cases: Displaying contextual information or options with smooth spring-based morphing animations
Creating animated dropdown menus that expand from their trigger element
Building tooltips with fluid enter/exit transitions using framer-motion
Implementing click-to-open popovers with automatic close on outside click
Adding interactive UI overlays with customizable spring physics and variants
ai_summary: A morphing popover component built with framer-motion that provides smooth spring-based animations when opening and closing. Uses React context for state management, supports both controlled and uncontrolled modes, and includes click-outside detection for automatic dismissal. The component features customizable transitions, variants, and composes multiple motion elements for a polished overlay experience.
